title: Expressing Logic
source_outline: Pseudocode: writing logic before writing code
Flowcharts: process, decision, and input/output symbols; drawing in Excalidraw
Flowchart-to-code translation: decision diamonds -> if/else; process boxes -> statements

next_assessment.title: Computational Thinking & AI Foundations
next_assessment.outcome: The learner can decompose a problem, write testable specifications, and describe and evaluate what an AI system can and cannot do.
